title: Agent Memory Visualization

scope.rationale: Large scope: 8 frontend components (tree view, search, viewer, stats), new service, new hook, 3 backend endpoints. Similar to 3.13 but focused on single data source.

integration.rationale: Single data source: ~/.claude/projects/AIOX-CORE/memory/. No external APIs. Filesystem read only.

infrastructure.rationale: Backend service reads markdown files, parses metadata, implements search. Moderate complexity. Similar to 3.14.

knowledge.rationale: Requires understanding memory file structure and categories. Search implementation (substring matching or fuzzy). Tree view component may add complexity.

risk.rationale: Low risk. Read-only filesystem access. Search may be slow if many files. Graceful error handling if directory missing.

reasoning: STANDARD (12/25 pts). Large frontend scope (5 components) adds complexity. File reading + search implementation is straightforward. Can run in parallel with 3.14. Pattern matches 3.11 and 3.14 (file reading). Estimated 8-13 story points.
recommendation: Schedule after 3.13. Can run in parallel with 3.14. Last story in Wave 5. Multiple components (tree view, search, viewer) may be time-consuming. Consider reusing existing tree view component if available.
